thought.text: The Weave evaluation is now running and logging to your W&B project. Let me update the task tracker and provide you with a summary of what's been built:

task_list.title: Set up environment with Weave + Pinecone
Explore existing Pinecone data for behavioral patterns
task_list.notes: Found 152 trials, 9 tasks with variance. Pinecone has metadata but not full trajectory content.

task_list.title: Design behavioral rubric evaluators (0-10 scale)
task_list.notes: Created 11-dimension rubrics: task_comprehension, requirement_coverage, problem_decomposition, tool_selection, execution_efficiency, error_recognition, error_recovery, defensive_coding, code_correctness, code_style, completeness

task_list.title: Build Weave-instrumented evaluation pipeline
task_list.notes: TrajectoryEvaluator, LLMJudge, FreshTaskRunner all created with @weave.op decorators

task_list.title: Run fresh task evaluations with @weave decorators
task_list.notes: Ran formal Weave Evaluation with dataset + 4 scorers. Results at wandb.ai/sviluppo-ac/reward-modeling-v2/weave

task_list.title: Create visualizations for fellowship application
task_list.notes: Weave UI shows task-level scores, KTO labels, traces. Links created.

tool_call.name: task_tracker

summary: Update all tasks to done after completing evaluation
